methodology: Element-grounding via OpenRouter. Baselines: raw HTML, DOM outline, interactive candidates. WCI: wci-full (full graph, no state patches) vs wci-grounding (actionable nodes, decision-point patches). Playwright validates raw paths. Temperature=0.
